name: claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: code_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Generate code for the following requirements: {input_data}
prompts.use_case: Automating and enhancing code generation tasks across multiple AI coding assistants.

prompts.name: marketing_copy_prompt
prompts.template: Create a marketing pitch based on these points: {input_data}
prompts.use_case: Generating marketing content drafts and campaign strategies using AI plugins.

prompts.name: product_insight_prompt
prompts.use_case: Assisting product managers with feature ideation and planning via AI-driven insights.

prompts.name: compliance_check_prompt
prompts.use_case: Conducting compliance checks and generating regulatory documentation.

prompts.name: executive_advice_prompt
prompts.use_case: Providing C-level executives with AI-powered strategic advisory support.
